feature.name: Agile
feature.text: Your movement is silent, and you can **spend a Hope** to move up to Far range without rolling.

feature.name: Fragile
feature.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

feature.name: Companion
feature.text: When you Help an Ally, you can roll a **d8** as your advantage die.

feature.name: Fragile
feature.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

feature.name: Elusive Prey
feature.text: When an attack roll against you would succeed, you can **mark a Stress** and roll a **d4.** Add the result to your Evasion against this attack.

feature.name: Fragile
feature.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

feature.name: Hobbling Strike
feature.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, you can **mark a Stress** to make the target temporarily _Vulnerable_.

feature.name: Pack Hunting
feature.text: When you succeed on an attack against the same target as an ally who acts immediately before you, add a **d8** to your damage roll.

feature.name: Aquatic
feature.text: You can breathe and move naturally underwater.

feature.name: Fragile
feature.text: When you take Major or greater damage, you drop out of Beastform.

feature.name: Venomous Bite
feature.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, the target becomes temporarily _Poisoned_. A _Poisoned_ creature takes **1d10** direct physical damage each time they act.

feature.name: Webslinger
feature.text: You can create a strong web material useful for both adventuring and battle. The web is resilient enough to support one creature. You can temporarily _Restrain_ a target within Close range by succeeding on a Finesse Roll against them.

feature.name: Armored Shell
feature.text: Your hardened exterior gives you resistance to physical damage. Additionally, **mark an Armor Slot** to retract into your shell. While in your shell, physical damage is reduced by a number equal to your Armor Score (after applying resistance), but you can't perform other actions without leaving this form.

feature.name: Cannonball
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to allow an ally to throw or launch you at an adversary. To do so, the ally makes an attack roll using Agility or Strength (their choice) against a target within Close range. On a success, the adversary takes **d12+2** physical damage using the thrower's Proficiency. You can **spend a Hope** to target an additional adversary within Very Close range of the first. The second target takes half the damage dealt to the first target.

feature.name: Rampage
feature.text: When you roll a 1 on a damage die, you can roll a **d10** and add the result to the damage roll. Additionally, before you make an attack roll, you can **mark a Stress** to gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency for that attack.

feature.name: Thick Hide
feature.text: You gain a +2 bonus to your damage thresholds.

feature.name: Carrier
feature.text: You can carry up to two willing allies with you when you move.

feature.name: Trample
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to move up to Close range in a straight line and make an attack against all targets within Melee range of the line. Targets you succeed against take **d8+1** physical damage using your Proficiency and are temporarily _Vulnerable_.

feature.name: Venomous Strike
feature.text: Make an attack against any number of targets within Very Close range. On a success, a target is temporarily _Poisoned_. A _Poisoned_ creature takes **1d10** direct physical damage each time they act.

feature.name: Warning Hiss
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to force any number of targets within Melee range to move back to Very Close range.

feature.name: Fleet
feature.text: **Spend a Hope** to move up to Far range without rolling.

feature.name: Takedown
feature.text: **Mark a Stress** to move into Melee range of a target and make an attack roll against them. On a success, you gain a +2 bonus to your Proficiency for this attack and the target must mark a Stress.

feature.name: Bird's-Eye View
feature.text: You can fly at will. Once per rest while you are airborne, you can ask the GM a question about the scene below you without needing to roll. The first time a character makes a roll to act on this information, they gain advantage on the roll.

feature.name: Hollow Bones
feature.text: You gain a -2 penalty to your damage thresholds.

feature.name: Carrier
feature.text: You can carry up to two willing allies with you when you move.

feature.name: Vicious Maul
feature.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target, you can **spend a Hope** to make them temporarily _Vulnerable_ and gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency for this attack.

feature.name: Physical Defense
feature.text: You gain a +3 bonus to your damage thresholds.

feature.name: Snapping Strike
feature.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, you can **spend a Hope** to clamp that opponent in your jaws, making them temporarily _Restrained_ and _Vulnerable._

feature.name: Bird's-Eye View
feature.text: You can fly at will. Once per rest while you are airborne, you can ask the GM a question about the scene below you without needing to roll. The first time a character makes a roll to act on this information, they gain advantage on the roll.

feature.name: Carrier
feature.text: You can carry up to two willing allies with you when you move.

feature.name: Aquatic
feature.text: You can breathe and move naturally underwater.

feature.name: Vicious Maul
feature.text: When you succeed on an attack against a target, you can **spend a Hope** to make them _Vulnerable_ and gain a +1 bonus to your Proficiency for this attack.

feature.name: Evolved
feature.text:
Pick a Tier 1 Beastform option and become a larger, more powerful version of that creature. While you're in this form, you retain all traits and features from the original form and gain the following bonuses:

- A +6 bonus to damage rolls
- A +1 bonus to the trait used by this form
- A +2 bonus to Evasion

feature.name: Hybrid Features
feature.text: To transform into this creature, **mark an additional Stress.** Choose any two Beastform options from Tiers 1-2. Choose a total of four advantages and two features from those options.

feature.name: Carrier
feature.text: You can carry up to four willing allies with you when you move.

feature.name: Demolish
feature.text: **Spend a Hope** to move up to Far range in a straight line and make an attack against all targets within Melee range of the line. Targets you succeed against take **d8+10** physical damage using your Proficiency and are temporarily _Vulnerable._

feature.name: Undaunted
feature.text: You gain a +2 bonus to all your damage thresholds.

feature.name: Devastating Strikes
feature.text: When you deal Severe damage to a target within Melee range, you can **mark a Stress** to force them to mark an additional Hit Point.

feature.name: Massive Stride
feature.text: You can move up to Far range without rolling. You ignore rough terain (at the GM's discretion) due to your size.

feature.name: Carrier
feature.text: You can carry up to three willing allies with you when you move.

feature.name: Deadly Raptor
feature.text: You can fly at will and move up to Far range as part of your action. When you move in a straight line into Melee range of a target from at least Close range and make an attack against that target in the same action, you can reroll all damage dice that rolled a result lower than your Proficiency.

feature.name: Ocean Master
feature.text: You can breathe and move naturally underwater. When you succeed on an attack against a target within Melee range, you can temporarily _Restrain_ them.

feature.name: Unyielding
feature.text: When you would mark an Armor Slot, roll a **d6.** On a result of 5 or higher, reduce the severity by one threshold without marking an Armor Slot.

feature.name: Evolved
feature.text:
Pick a Tier 1 or Tier 2 Beastform option and become a larger, more powerful version of that creature. While you're in this form, you retain all traits and features from the original form and gain the following bonuses:

- A +9 bonus to damage rolls
- A +2 bonus to the trait used by this form
- A +3 bonus to Evasion
- Your damage die increases by one size (d6 becomes d8, d8 becomes d10, etc.)

feature.name: Hybrid Features
feature.text: To transform into this creature, **mark 2 additional Stress.** Choose any three Beastform options from Tiers 1-3. Choose a total of five advantages and three features from those options.
